meaning: n.[药]环丙甲羟二羟吗啡酮(麻醉药拮抗药)
examples: These results provide support for researchers' prediction that naltrexone will turn out to be toxic to certain types of bacteria.
When mice are given both morphine and the new drug naltrexone, blood poisoning is much less frequent, although it does still occur.
So, the role of naltrexone improving memory is also required further study.
Pouletty, aiming to overcome those hurdles, is working with both naltrexone and Abbott's Parkinson's compound.
Orexigen continues to seek approval for its fixed-combination of naltrexone on bupropion, Contrave.
